# Audience Persona Template

## Purpose
This template helps you create detailed, research-based profiles of your ideal customers. Use these personas to guide content creation, platform selection, messaging, and campaign targeting.

**Instructions:**
1. Create 2-4 personas representing your primary and secondary audiences
2. Base personas on actual customer data when possible
3. Update personas quarterly based on new insights
4. Share personas with all team members creating content

---

#### Content Preferences
**Content Types They Engage With:**
- [ ] Educational/how-to content
- [ ] Industry news and trends
- [ ] Behind-the-scenes content
- [ ] User-generated content
- [ ] Inspirational/motivational content
- [ ] Humorous/entertaining content
- [ ] Product demonstrations
- [ ] Case studies and testimonials

**Content Formats They Prefer:**
- [ ] Short videos (under 60 seconds)
- [ ] Long-form videos
- [ ] Images and graphics
- [ ] Carousels/slides
- [ ] Text-based posts
- [ ] Stories/Reels/Shorts
- [ ] Live streams
- [ ] Podcasts/audio

#### Engagement Patterns
- **Typical engagement:** [[LIKES / COMMENTS / SHARES / SAVES]]
- **Response style:** [[LURKER / ENGAGER / CREATOR]]
- **Comment behavior:** [[RARELY / OCCASIONALLY / FREQUENTLY]]

## PERSONA COMPARISON MATRIX

| Attribute | Persona 1 | Persona 2 | Persona 3 |
|-----------|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| **Name** | [[NAME]] | [[NAME]] | [[NAME]] |
| **Age** | [[AGE]] | [[AGE]] | [[AGE]] |
| **Primary Platform** | [[PLATFORM]] | [[PLATFORM]] | [[PLATFORM]] |
| **Biggest Challenge** | [[CHALLENGE]] | [[CHALLENGE]] | [[CHALLENGE]] |
| **Primary Goal** | [[GOAL]] | [[GOAL]] | [[GOAL]] |
| **Content Preference** | [[PREFERENCE]] | [[PREFERENCE]] | [[PREFERENCE]] |
| **Priority Level** | [[P1/P2/P3]] | [[P1/P2/P3]] | [[P1/P2/P3]] |

---

## PERSONA VALIDATION CHECKLIST

Before finalizing personas, verify:

- [ ] Based on actual customer data or research
- [ ] Includes both demographic and psychographic details
- [ ] Identifies specific pain points and challenges
- [ ] Defines clear goals and motivations
- [ ] Documents social media behavior and preferences
- [ ] Notes preferred content types and formats
- [ ] Includes actionable insights for content creation
- [ ] Reviewed and validated by customer-facing team members
- [ ] Tested against actual customer conversations
- [ ] Updated quarterly based on new insights

---

## RESEARCH SOURCES

**Data Sources Used:**
- [ ] Customer interviews/surveys
- [ ] Social media analytics
- [ ] Website analytics
- [ ] Sales team insights
- [ ] Customer support tickets
- [ ] Industry research reports
- [ ] Competitor analysis
- [ ] Focus groups
